narrative: Hawkish RBNZ guidance lifts NZD/USD to 0.5891 as crude oil's -4.54% plunge and US-Iran peace hopes pressure the dollar. USD/JPY holds at 159.54, anchored by a 300bp Fed-BoJ carry advantage, while gold retreats -1.27% to two-month lows near $4,477; equities -0.09%; DXY +0.08%; VIX 16.8. Watch the RBNZ policy meeting today at 02:00 UTC for further rate path confirmation.
